ecb.description: ALTERED BUILDING OCCUPIED WITHOUT A VALID C OF O AS REQUIRED UNDER OPEN ALTERATION 866/88 AT THE PENTHOUSE LEVEL REMEDY OBTAIN A NEW C OF O
FAILURE TO PROVIDE APPROVED PLANS AT PREMISES ATTIME OF INSPECTION FOR ALT 866/88 REMEDY PROVIDE APPROVED PLANS ON PREMISES AT ALL TIMES TO CONDUCT INSPECTION

: FAILURE TO MAINTAIN BUILDING IN CODE COMPLIANT MANNER. SERVICE ELEVATOR EQUIPMENT AS PER BC3001.2 & 27-987. UPON INSPECTION, THE DEVICE IS FOUND TO BE OUT OF SERVICE, CREATING A HAZARDOUS CONDITION PER 1RCNY

NO DOOR LOCK MONITORING INSTALLED IN THISDLM IMPROPERLY INSTALLED ON THIS DEVICE. NO FIREMANS SERVICE PRESENT IN CONTROLLER. INSTALL FIREMANS SERVICE SO DLM IS IN COMPLIANCE WITH SECTION 3.10.12 OF APPENDIX K3.

CLASS 1: UPON INSPECTION FOUND DEVICE TO BE OUT OF SERVICE. THIS IS A SEVERE SAFETY HAZZARD TO RESIDENTS & FIRST RESPONDERS. THIS IS A RECURRING CONDITON AS DEVICE HAS BEEN OUT OF SERVICE FOR SEVERAL MONTHS. RE
VF.... R T S .... ELEVATOR IN BUILDING OUT OF SERVICE,..UPON INSPECTION THE DEVICE IS FOUND TO BE OUT OF SERVICE... REPAIR AND RESTORE TO SERVICE IMMEDIATELY.. RE INSPECTION REQUIRED...

CLASS 1:FAILURE TO MAINTAIN BUILDING IN CODE COMPLIANT MANNER. SERVICE ELEVATOR EQUIPMENT AS PER BC3001.2 & 27-987. UPON INSPECTION, THE ONLY DEVICE IN THE SECTION OF THE BUILDING IS FOUND TO BE OUT OF SERVICE,
ENTIRE DEVICE IS SHUT DOWN. NEED TO REPAIR AND RE-INSPECTION REQUIRED. NO ACCESS TO MOTOR ROOM AT TIME OF INSPECTION, MUST PROVIDE ACCESS TO MOTOR ROOM.
97/X/17 CLASS 1 RESTORE TO SERVICE FOR PROPER INSPECTION BY DOB INOPERATIVE REPAIR
